persName: persName: a person — full name, 字 courtesy name, emperor/ruler, or clear single-char biographical reference (玄, 融).
placeName: placeName: a geographic or administrative place — 郡/縣/國, region, or compound toponym as written (北海高密, 京兆, 涿郡).
roleName: roleName: an office, title, or role name —官職, position, administrative office, or title of function (內史, 太守, 司馬).
